tasks.name: 1-qubit coherence baseline
tasks.purpose: tau_2 noise floor (Forte 1 min shots=100; bumped from 50 in spec)

cost_ledger.delta_reason: Forte 1 min-shots=100 forced C2 from 50->100 shots, +$4.00

honest_c3: Forte 1 does not support 'i' (identity) gate outside verbatim mode -- spec circuit had to be patched. Replaced 'i' identity-stack delay surrogate with rx(2*pi) full-rotation surrogate (also returns to identity, but takes real gate time).
Forte 1 minimum-shots = 100; spec had C2 at 50 shots; bumped to 100 (+$4.00). Total now $24.90 vs spec $20.90, still under $50 hard cap.

C3 Bell submission was first try from original (unpatched) script -- it succeeded because Bell circuit doesn't use 'i'. C2 + C1 required patching and re-submission. C3 task ARN preserved across the patch.
next_step: Poll all 3 task ARNs until status=COMPLETED, then run verify_F_N12_1.py
